componentGuidelines.canvasStylingContract: Components canvas: Tailwind utilities from tailwind.config.js only (no arbitrary hex in canvas JSX). Neutral publish classes live in canvas-node-publish.ts + index.css. Confirm-password valid ring: theme.extend.boxShadow.confirm-password-valid + overflow-visible shell on that block.

button.primaryCanvasAlias: primary-canvas-button — same paint as canvas-primary-button (use for in-canvas primary CTAs when needed).
button.primaryDescription: Primary CTA: canvas-primary-button or primary-canvas-button in src/index.css (theme() brandcolor-primary / brandcolor-primaryhover). Label text-brandcolor-white. Do not use brandcolor-badge-success-* for primary or for canvas Published state.
button.primaryEquivalentTailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-brandcolor-white bg-brandcolor-primary hover:bg-brandcolor-primaryhover active:shadow-button-press focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 appearance-none border-0
button.secondaryCanvasAlias: secondary-canvas-button — same paint as canvas-secondary-button (in-canvas secondary CTAs).
button.secondaryDescription: Secondary CTA: canvas-secondary-button or secondary-canvas-button in src/index.css (theme() brandcolor-secondary / brandcolor-secondaryhover). Label text-brandcolor-white.
button.secondaryEquivalentTailwind: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-brandcolor-white bg-brandcolor-secondary hover:bg-brandcolor-secondaryhover active:shadow-button-press focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 appearance-none border-0
button.componentsCanvasExample: ComponentsCanvasSurface: world pan/zoom; initial card + primary + secondary + neutral + confirm password; localStorage agentic-components-canvas-nodes-v1. Kinds: card, primaryButton, secondaryButton, neutralButton, confirmPasswordInput. Catalog ids canvas-card-* / canvas-primary-* / canvas-secondary-* / canvas-neutral-* / canvas-confirm-password-*. Prune: scripts/prune-canvas-catalog.mjs.
button.neutral: Reference — neutral canvas: index.css .neutral-canvas-button; strokeweak border, hover strokelight; publish string in canvas-node-publish.ts

componentsCanvasCard.description: Default block on ComponentsCanvasSurface — same surface token as componentGuidelines.card; typography uses tailwind.config.js brand text colors only. Hover help: parent group/canvas-tip + .canvas-element-tooltip (+ optional .canvas-element-tooltip-detail); avoid title= on canvas chrome to prevent OS tooltips.
componentsCanvasCard.title: font-sans text-base font-semibold text-brandcolor-textstrong
componentsCanvasCard.subtitle: mt-1 text-sm text-brandcolor-textweak

componentsCanvasPrimaryButton.description: Components canvas block kind primaryButton: wrapped in same card surface as componentsCanvasCard; inner control uses primary-canvas-button (src/index.css) so fill is theme brandcolor-primary and hover brandcolor-primaryhover (tailwind.config.js). Published sourceHtml uses the same Tailwind utility names as componentGuidelines.button.primaryEquivalentTailwind for static export. Catalog componentId prefix canvas-primary-.

componentsCanvasSecondaryButton.description: Components canvas block kind secondaryButton: same outer chrome as componentsCanvasCard; inner control uses secondary-canvas-button (src/index.css) for brandcolor-secondary and hover brandcolor-secondaryhover (tailwind.config.js). Published sourceHtml uses componentGuidelines.button.secondaryEquivalentTailwind. Catalog componentId prefix canvas-secondary-.

componentsCanvasNeutralButton.description: Canvas neutralButton: same card chrome; neutral-canvas-button in index.css. Catalog prefix canvas-neutral-.

componentsCanvasConfirmPasswordInput.description: Canvas confirmPasswordInput: .confirm-password-canvas-input — default border-brandcolor-strokeweak; :focus and :user-valid use border (1px) border-brandcolor-primary + theme boxShadow.confirm-password-valid (0 0 0 2px #F8441633). Shell clipShell=false. Catalog prefix canvas-confirm-password-.

caseCard.description: Case study card: case name (h2) with share + tag icon actions on the header row, subheading (text-strong), description (text-weak body).
caseCard.surface: Same as card — rounded-lg border border-brandcolor-strokeweak bg-brandcolor-white shadow-card

profileCard.description: Profile / identity card: name row with trailing icon actions, title line, two body lines. Uses same surface as card.
profileCard.name: componentGuidelines.heading.h2 — font-sans text-xl font-semibold text-brandcolor-textstrong
profileCard.title: text-sm text-brandcolor-textweak (role / subtitle under name)
profileCard.iconButton: h-8 w-8 rounded-md border border-transparent text-brandcolor-textstrong hover:bg-brandcolor-fill active:border active:border-brandcolor-strokeweak focus:outline-none focus-visible:border focus-visible:border-brandcolor-strokeweak

heading.h1: font-sans text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-brandcolor-textstrong c_md:text-4xl

componentGuidelines.input: w-full rounded-md border border-brandcolor-strokestrong bg-brandcolor-white px-3 py-2 text-sm text-brandcolor-textstrong placeholder:text-brandcolor-textweak focus:border-brandcolor-textstrong focus:outline-none focus:ring-0

spacing.description: 4-point grid: use multiples of 4px for margins, padding, and gaps. Tailwind spacing utilities map 1:1 (space-1 = 0.25rem = 4px at 16px root). Layout plans use semantic afterGap tokens (aliases below).

spaceScaleUsage.space-1: 4px — icon to text, micro gaps (Tailwind gap-1 / mt-1).
spaceScaleUsage.space-4: 16px — default stack gap between fields (gap-4 / mb-4).

scale.tight: mb-2 or gap-2 — 8px (space-2); title–subtitle stack inside pageHeading chrome uses space-y-1 (4px) in UI.
scale.default: mb-4 or gap-4 — 16px (space-4); between related catalog blocks in a form stack.
scale.section: mb-6 or gap-6 — 24px (space-6); between major sections or before a new chrome heading after catalog.
scale.hero: mb-8 or gap-8 — 32px (space-8); strong break after a hero title before first component.

semantics: Title and subtitle inside one chrome block: tight rhythm (space-y-1 ≈ space-1 between lines).
afterGap on a block sets space BEFORE the next block (margin below this block). Last block has no bottom margin.
Structured preview: chrome→catalog and catalog→catalog infer default (space-4) when afterGap is omitted; catalog→chrome uses section (space-6).
Catalog sourceHtml roots: avoid h-full justify-center and heavy outer p-*; use w-full flex-col justify-start so the composer controls vertical rhythm.
Repeat instances in one catalog block (flow): vertical stack with gap-4 (space-4) between cells.

Layout plan row: 2–4 columns of chrome/catalog leaves. Default row is side-by-side from 640px (stack only on very narrow viewports). stackBelow md|lg = stack until that breakpoint. split: sidebarMain; sidebarWidth narrow|default|wide.
Nested row/split inside columns is not allowed — only chrome and catalog leaves inside row columns and split regions.

criticalRules: Do not use raw hex color values in JSX, CSS modules, or inline styles for branded UI.
Do not use default Tailwind palette utilities (e.g. bg-gray-*, text-blue-*) for branded surfaces; use bg-brandcolor-*, text-brandcolor-*, border-brandcolor-* only.
Buttons use rounded-md (6px) per theme; cards use rounded-lg with border-brandcolor-strokeweak and shadow-card.

Layout plan: if the user wants two fields side by side or on one row, output ONE type row with two columns (one catalog leaf per column)—never two top-level catalog blocks. Use type split for sidebar + main. afterGap / defaultAfterGap: tight, default, section, hero. Client infers afterGap: row/split next to catalog/chrome uses default (space-4) like stacked fields; section between row↔split or catalog→chrome unless overridden.
Do not use arbitrary mt-48, mb-20, or one-off pixel classes for stack gaps; refer to spacing.spaceScaleRem and layoutTokenMap.
Catalog blueprint roots: no h-full justify-center on layout previews; minimal outer padding so gaps match spacing.semantics.
